% Invalid PV format examples — boundary cases and structural violations
% Missing system
:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
% Empty subsystem after dash
DTL-:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
% System starts with dash
-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature
% Missing device in device part
DTL-010:EMR--001:Temperature
% Missing index
DTL-010:EMR-TT:TemperatureMin
% Missing colon before property
DTL-010:EMR-TT-011TemperatureMax
% All structure empty
DTL-::Temperature
% Too many colons
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature:Extra
% No colons at all
DTL010EMRTT001Temperature
% Only one colon (ambiguous)
DTL-010:Temperature
% Empty string between colons
::Temperature
% Just colons
:::
% Missing property (trailing colon only)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:
% Single character system with empty rest
D::
